title: selaginella hallieri
intro: Selaginella hallieri is a type of spore-producing, evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella hallieri include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Selaginella hallieri is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used topically in creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
